message:
refactor: remove legacy YAML parsing and serialization from genome layer

- Remove YAML file reading from Genome.loadFromDisk (now .md only)
- Delete serializeAgentSpec (replaced by serializeAgentMarkdown)
- Delete loadAgentSpec (no longer needed)
- Make parseAgentSpec private (still used by readRootDir YAML branch)
- Remove loadAgentSpec from agents/index.ts exports
- Remove tests for deleted functions, update test helpers to use stringify

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
